title: Sparse Delta Memory: Scaling the State of Linear RNNs through Sparsity
authors: Loïc Cabannes; Pierre-Emmanuel Mazaré; Gergely Szilvasy; Matthijs Douze; Maria Lomeli; Ilze Amanda Auzina; Justin Carpentier; Gabriel Synnaeve; Hervé Jégou

abstract_summary_en: Linear attention models allow a fixed state size and a fixed amount of compute per token. However, due to their limited state size, linear attention models fall behind in long-context recall compared to softmax-attention-based transformer…
